# format: html5-dom-v1
# status: active
# include_parse_errors: true
#document
  <!doctype html>
  <html>
    <head>
    <body>
      <table>
        <form>
        <input type="hidden">
        <tbody>
          <tr>
            <td>
              "x"
parse-errors:
  tree-builder: before-html-implicit-html
  tree-builder: before-head-implicit-head
  tree-builder: after-head-implicit-body
  tree-builder: in-table-form-start-tag
  tree-builder: in-table-hidden-input-start-tag
  tree-builder: in-table-anything-else-reprocess-in-body
  tree-builder: in-body-form-end-tag-pointer-not-in-scope
